headline: Is Analog Devices (ADI) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Strong 1 Year Share Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Analog Devices at around US$310.92 is offering good value or asking too much, the answer depends on which valuation lens you choose to look through. The stock has seen mixed recent moves, with a 2.7% decline over 7 days and a 7.8% decline over 30 days, set against a 13.6% gain year to date and a 49.1% return over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on Analog Devices' role in semiconductors and how investors are reassessing large chip names in light of...
